calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marvin Ramirez, petitioner in Pro Per.

The matter was called for hearing on a Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage.

Mr. Ramirez stated that he sought to amend his parents' marriage certificate to add an "also known as" designation (AKA) for his late father, who was born as Jose Jesus Calero but lived and was recognized throughout his life as Jose Santos Ramirez.

Mr. Ramirez explained that his mother is entitled to a 25% share of a property in Nicaragua, and that registration of the marriage was required in Nicaragua. He stated that registration of the marriage in Nicaragua required consistent documentation, and that the authorities there would not accept U.S. immigration or Homeland Security documentation showing both names, and that the Office of Vital Records advised him a court order was required to add the AKA.

Following discussion, the Court took the matter under submission for further consideration.

Judge: Lydia Villarreal; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
